steps.t: Intact Orkish arrows can be found scattered in the ground at Zarkul-sulûn. Hoping to arm Zhélruka archers, Rádek has asked you to collect intact Orkis…
Zhélruka archers can be found at Zarkul-sulûn. You have collected the Orkish arrows and should now deliver them to Zhélruka archers at Zarkul-sulûn.
Rádek can be found at Zarkul-sulûn. You have armed the Zhélruka archers and should now report back to Rádek.
